params.name: Gertie the Dinosaur
params.description:
On May 7, 1913 AD, McCay designed the image of Gertie, the dinosaur.
Gertie the Dinosaur is a pioneering work of animation by McCay, the pioneer of the animation industry. The creation of the animated character, Gertie the Dinosaur, marked a turning point in the animation industry. Before its creation, animation was mainly used as a special effect in movies or the experimental work of elite artists. The creation of Gertie the Dinosaur not only directly influenced all the cartoonists and anima …
